::: {.grid .gap-0 .row-gap-0 .column-gap-1}

::: {.g-col-8 .mb-0 .pb-0}
**Lecturer**
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .mb-0 .pb-0 style="font-size: 90%;"}
Aug. 2024 - now
:::

::: {.g-col-8 .g-start-0 .my-0 .py-0 style="margin-top: -1rem !important; font-size: 90%;"}
Centre for Vision, Speech and Signal Processing
:::

::: {.g-col-8 .g-start-0 .my-0 .py-0 style="margin-top: -1rem !important; font-size: 90%;"}
University of Surrey, UK
:::

<!--  -->

::: {.g-col-8 .mb-0 .pb-0}
**Research Fellow**
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .mb-0 .pb-0 style="font-size: 90%;"}
Mar. 2024 - Jul. 2025
:::

::: {.g-col-8 .g-start-0 .my-0 .py-0 style="margin-top: -1rem !important; font-size: 90%;"}
Centre for Vision, Speech and Signal Processing
:::

::: {.g-col-8 .g-start-0 .my-0 .py-0 style="margin-top: -1rem !important; font-size: 90%;"}
University of Surrey, UK
:::

<!--  -->

::: {.g-col-8 .mb-0 .pb-0}
**Research Associate**
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .mb-0 .pb-0 style="font-size: 90%;"}
Apr. 2022 - Jan. 2024
:::

::: {.g-col-8 .g-start-0 .my-0 .py-0 style="margin-top: -1rem !important; font-size: 90%;"}
Australia Institute for Machine Learning
:::

::: {.g-col-8 .g-start-0 .my-0 .py-0 style="margin-top: -1rem !important; font-size: 90%;"}
The University of Adelaide, Australia
:::

:::
